title: Golden Globes 2026 Complete Winners List - Rolling Stone
text: Rolling Stone's comprehensive Golden Globes 2026 winners list includes all major film and television awards. Best Motion Picture Drama went to Hamnet. Best Motion Picture Musical or Comedy went to One Battle After Another. Best Director went to Paul Thomas Anderson for One Battle After Another. Best Male Actor Drama went to Wagner Moura for The Secret Agent. Best Female Actor Drama went to Jessie Buckley for Hamnet. Best Male Actor Musical/Comedy went to Timothée Chalamet for Marty Supreme. Best Female Actor Musical/Comedy went to Rose Byrne for If I Had Legs I'd Kick You. Best Supporting Male Actor went to Stellan Skarsgård for Sentimental Value. Best Supporting Female Actor went to Teyana Taylor for One Battle After Another. Best Original Score went to Ludwig Göransson for Sinners.
